basic_details.job_title: Punjab House Surgeon Recruitment 2026: 523 Posts, Apply Online Before 26 July
basic_details.short_information: The Directorate of Health and Family Welfare, Punjab has issued a public notice for the Punjab House Surgeon Recruitment 2026, inviting online applications for 523 House Surgeon posts across District Hospitals and Sub-Divisional Hospitals in the state. Eligible MBBS graduates can apply online at nhm.punjab.gov.in on or before 26 July 2026 (midnight). Selected candidates will be posted for a six-month House Job session running from August 2026 to January 2027, with counseling scheduled for 28 July 2026.

application_fee.details: Not specified in the official notice. Candidates should check the online application portal at nhm.punjab.gov.in for any applicable fee details.

age_limit.details: The age of the candidate shall be less than 37 years as on the date specified in the notification.

qualification.details: Not explicitly specified in the notice. Candidates who have graduated from medical colleges outside India are also eligible, subject to clearing the National Board of Examinations (NBE). | Candidates graduating from medical colleges established/run by the Government of India or State Government, or through a Society established/run by the Government and predominantly funded by it Candidates graduating from medical colleges other than those established/run by the Government of India/State Government or such a Society Candidates graduating from medical colleges outside India | Applications are considered priority-wise - candidates in the next priority category are considered only after all applicants from the previous priority category have been exhausted or considered.

salary_details.details: House Surgeon: ₹70,000 per month | Each selected candidate must deposit a security amount of ₹20,000 before joining duty. This security is forfeited, and no House Job completion certificate is issued, if the House Surgeon leaves before completing the full tenure or is discharged due to unsatisfactory conduct.

selection_process: Selection to the House Surgeon post will be made purely on merit
determined on the basis of the percentage of marks obtained in the professional MBBS university examinations - 1st Professional
and Final Professional MBBS. Merit is applied within the order-of-priority framework described above.
The Selection Committee will function at the district level and comprise:
Civil Surgeon of the District - Chairman Assistant Civil Surgeon Representative of the Deputy Commissioner District Social Justice Empowerment Officer
how_to_apply: Locate the House Surgeon Recruitment 2026 online application link

Fill in personal details, MBBS qualification details, marks obtained (1st Prof., 2nd Prof., Final Prof. Part I and II), registration number/council, NBE status (if applicable), internship completion date, and up to three district preferences
Submit the application online before the deadline
Note: Applications must be submitted through the online portal only. No hard copy/offline applications will be entertained.
important_instructions: These House Jobs are for general, emergency, and specialized duties - not for a single specialty. No TA/DA will be paid for journeys undertaken for counseling or interview. The maximum tenure of House Job appointment for any particular candidate is one year. Selected candidates must join within one week from the batch start date, failing which the next candidate on the waiting list will be invited. Every candidate must affirm in writing that they are not bonded to serve the State/Central Government. Bonded candidates must obtain a No Objection Certificate from the Director, Research and Medical Education, Punjab, Chandigarh, or the Director, Health and Family Planning, Punjab, Chandigarh. A House Job completion certificate will be issued by the Civil Surgeon only on successful completion of the full tenure; no certificate is issued to candidates who leave before completion. A House Physician/House Surgeon is eligible for one leave per month. Leave taken beyond this is without pay and extends the tenure to complete the certificate requirement. Carry-forward of unutilized leave is permitted only within the tenure of the ongoing batch. Reservation will be applicable as per Punjab Government rules and policy/guidelines from time to time. The number of posts may be decreased or increased without prior notice.

content_sections.heading: Punjab House Surgeon Notification 2026 - PDF
content_sections.text: The official public notice (No. E4(4)/Pb./2026/) has been uploaded by the Directorate of Health and Family Welfare, Punjab, along with the district-wise vacancy breakup (Annexure-A) and the application format. Candidates are advised to read the full notification carefully before applying. The notice and online application link are available on the official website: https://nhm.punjab.gov.in Download DHFW Punjab House Surgeon Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Here

rows.details: Directorate of Health and Family Welfare, Punjab
6 months (maximum tenure for a candidate: 1 year)

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Counseling will be held at the respective District Civil Surgeon office, as per the candidate's first preferred district filled in the online application form.

content_sections.heading: Punjab House Surgeon Vacancy 2026: District-wise Breakup
content_sections.text: Note: The number of posts may be decreased or increased by the department without prior notice.

content_sections.heading: Punjab House Surgeon Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Not explicitly specified in the notice. Candidates who have graduated from medical colleges outside India are also eligible, subject to clearing the National Board of Examinations (NBE). Candidates graduating from medical colleges established/run by the Government of India or State Government, or through a Society established/run by the Government and predominantly funded by it Candidates graduating from medical colleges other than those established/run by the Government of India/State Government or such a Society Candidates graduating from medical colleges outside India Applications are considered priority-wise - candidates in the next priority category are considered only after all applicants from the previous priority category have been exhausted or considered.

rows.requirement: Must have cleared the National Board of Examinations (NBE)
Punjab Medical Council / Medical Council of India / National Medical Council
Must have passed Punjabi up to Matric level or an equivalent examination conducted by the Language Department, Punjab (as per latest government instructions)
Must be physically and mentally fit as per standards of fitness for entrance to Punjab State Medical Service

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: The age of the candidate shall be less than 37 years as on the date specified in the notification.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Not specified in the official notice. Candidates should check the online application portal at nhm.punjab.gov.in for any applicable fee details.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection to the House Surgeon post will be made purely on merit , determined on the basis of the percentage of marks obtained in the professional MBBS university examinations - 1st Professional, 2nd Professional, and Final Professional MBBS. Merit is applied within the order-of-priority framework described above. The Selection Committee will function at the district level and comprise: Civil Surgeon of the District - Chairman Assistant Civil Surgeon Representative of the Deputy Commissioner District Social Justice Empowerment Officer

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Punjab House Surgeon Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official website: nhm.punjab.gov.in Locate the House Surgeon Recruitment 2026 online application link Fill in personal details, MBBS qualification details, marks obtained (1st Prof., 2nd Prof., Final Prof. Part I and II), registration number/council, NBE status (if applicable), internship completion date, and up to three district preferences Upload passport-size photograph as required Submit the application online before the deadline Note: Applications must be submitted through the online portal only. No hard copy/offline applications will be entertained.

content_sections.heading: Punjab House Surgeon Salary/Remuneration 2026
content_sections.text: House Surgeon: ₹70,000 per month Each selected candidate must deposit a security amount of ₹20,000 before joining duty. This security is forfeited, and no House Job completion certificate is issued, if the House Surgeon leaves before completing the full tenure or is discharged due to unsatisfactory conduct.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Candidates
content_sections.text: These House Jobs are for general, emergency, and specialized duties - not for a single specialty. No TA/DA will be paid for journeys undertaken for counseling or interview. The maximum tenure of House Job appointment for any particular candidate is one year. Selected candidates must join within one week from the batch start date, failing which the next candidate on the waiting list will be invited. Every candidate must affirm in writing that they are not bonded to serve the State/Central Government. Bonded candidates must obtain a No Objection Certificate from the Director, Research and Medical Education, Punjab, Chandigarh, or the Director, Health and Family Planning, Punjab, Chandigarh. A House Job completion certificate will be issued by the Civil Surgeon only on successful completion of the full tenure; no certificate is issued to candidates who leave before completion. A House Physician/House Surgeon is eligible for one leave per month. Leave taken beyond this is without pay and extends the tenure to complete the certificate requirement. Carry-forward of unutilized leave is permitted only within the tenure of the ongoing batch. Reservation will be applicable as per Punjab Government rules and policy/guidelines from time to time. The number of posts may be decreased or increased without prior notice.

faq.question: Q1. How many House Surgeon positions are available in Punjab DHFW Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 523 House Surgeon posts are available in the Punjab DHFW House Surgeon Recruitment 2026. These positions will be filled across various government hospitals and medical institutions in Punjab.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for House Surgeon in Punjab DHFW 2026?
faq.answer: The monthly salary for House Surgeon position is Rs. 70,000/- per month. Additional allowances and benefits will be provided as per Government of Punjab norms.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for Punjab DHFW House Surgeon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting online applications is 26/07/2026 (excluding holidays). Candidates are advised to apply before the deadline to avoid any issues.

faq.question: Q4. When is the written examination for DHFW House Surgeon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The written examination for House Surgeon positions is scheduled on 28/07/2026. Exact timing and examination center details will be provided on the admit card and official website.

faq.question: Q5. What are the eligibility criteria for DHFW House Surgeon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Bachelor of Medicine, Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) degree from a recognized medical university and valid medical registration with the National Medical Commission (NMC). Detailed eligibility criteria will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is medical registration with NMC mandatory for House Surgeon position?
faq.answer: Yes, valid medical registration with the National Medical Commission (NMC) or Medical Council of India (MCI) is mandatory to apply for the House Surgeon position in Punjab DHFW.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for Punjab DHFW House Surgeon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official NHM Punjab website at https://nhm.punjab.gov.in. Visit the recruitment section, find the House Surgeon post, and click "Apply Online" to fill and submit your application.
